description: Lock corrected chronology and causal direction for grid-scale batteries, renewable grid integration, green hydrogen, and electrolyser manufacturing.

checks.reason: The megawatt-scale BEST facility began operating in 1982.
Grid batteries provide general utility services and do not require renewable generation.
Grid connection is constitutive of the scoped battery category.
The 1982 BEST milestone tested battery modules in a utility-grid environment.
The node is anchored to the first-of-a-kind full-scale Utsira wind-hydrogen system.
Utsira was a stand-alone coupled system, not dependent on utility-grid renewable integration.
Wind supplied the renewable electricity for the chronology anchor.
Wind generation was constitutive of the Utsira wind-hydrogen milestone.
The manufactured electrolyser performed the water-splitting process.
The scoped green-hydrogen process is renewable-powered water electrolysis.
Electrolyser manufacturing predates and enables the green-hydrogen application rather than depending on it.
The historical electrolysis lineage remains upstream of modern green hydrogen.
